Afi Wrap Alpha.description: Flamefete Ticket waistgear. Its strikingly vibrant colors flutter in the midsummer heat, painting the wind.

Ajarakan Coil.description: Ajarakan waistgear. It acts as a tether to quell the wearer's exploding rage.

Ajarakan Coil Alpha.description: Ajarakan waistgear. It acts as a tether to quell the wearer's exploding rage.

Ajarakan Coil Beta.description: Ajarakan waistgear. It acts as a tether to quell the wearer's exploding rage.

Alloy Coil.description: Waistgear crafted from quality ore. The complexly shaded patina and sleek design are quite stunning.

Alloy Coil Alpha.description: Waistgear crafted from quality ore. The complexly shaded patina and sleek design are quite stunning.

Arkvulcan Coil Alpha.description: Waistgear made from Arkveld spoils. Until the kingdom was restored, the knight bowed before no hardship.

Arkvulcan Coil Beta.description: Waistgear made from Arkveld spoils. Until the kingdom was restored, the knight bowed before no hardship.

Artian Coil Alpha.description: Waistgear made from eldritch scraps. Its original purpose remains a mystery.

Balahara Coil.description: Balahara waistgear. The fabric is colored a shade of red that stirs a competitive spirit.

Balahara Coil Alpha.description: Balahara waistgear. The fabric is colored a shade of red that stirs a competitive spirit.

Balahara Coil Beta.description: Balahara waistgear. The fabric is colored a shade of red that stirs a competitive spirit.

Bale Flanchard Alpha.description: Waistgear worn by a dark knight. Shadowy proof of those who resort to anything to realize their ideals.

Barina Coil.description: Lala Barina waistgear that nobility would gladly don just to make an impression.

Barina Coil Alpha.description: Lala Barina waistgear that nobility would gladly don just to make an impression.

Barina Coil Beta.description: Lala Barina waistgear that nobility would gladly don just to make an impression.

Battle Coil Alpha.description: Waistgear designed for seasoned hunters. The striking design offers a light, functional build.

Blango Coil Alpha.description: Waistgear made of Blangonga parts with technology from the "Eastern Land of the Gods."

Blango Coil Beta.description: Waistgear made of Blangonga parts with technology from the "Eastern Land of the Gods."

Blessed Waistchain Alpha.description: Waist protection said to bring hunters safety and prosperity, each link woven a blessing.

Blossom Coat Alpha.description: Blossom Ticket waistgear. Sure to make you as graceful as a spring butterfly floating among the flowers.

Bone Coil.description: Traditional waistgear bound with monster bones. Looks crude, but it does the job.

Bone Coil Alpha.description: Traditional waistgear bound with monster bones. Looks crude, but it does the job.

Butterfly Elytra Alpha.description: Dazzling armor made from insect parts. It radiates style akin to that of nobility.

Ceremonial Coil Alpha.description: Lumenhymn Ticket waistgear. A comforting presence, like the sun in the splendor of winter.

Chainmail Belt.description: Waistgear made of woven chain links. A smart combination of materials keeps it extra light.

Chainmail Belt Alpha.description: Waistgear made of woven chain links. A smart combination of materials keeps it extra light.

Chatacabra Coil.description: Chatacabra waistgear. The charming, heart-shaped pouch is made from its ample tongue.

Chatacabra Coil Alpha.description: Chatacabra waistgear. The charming, heart-shaped pouch is made from its ample tongue.

Chatacabra Coil Beta.description: Chatacabra waistgear. The charming, heart-shaped pouch is made from its ample tongue.

Clerk Belt Alpha.description: Grand Hub handler waistgear. A fine piece of equipment that's unparalleled in both form and function.

Commission Coil Alpha.description: Waistgear worn by hunters on an expedition to the New World. Sturdily made.

Conga Coil.description: Waistgear made from Congalala materials, complete with an array of handy pockets!

Conga Coil Alpha.description: Waistgear made from Congalala materials, complete with an array of handy pockets!

Dahaad Shardcoil Alpha.description: Jin Dahaad waistgear. The ornate design recalls the majesty of a lost dynasty.

Dahaad Shardcoil Gamma.description: Waist armor made from special Jin Dahaad materials. The shining white ornamentation evokes the fortitude of the Arch-tempered.

Damascus Coil Alpha.description: Steel waistgear said to lead its wearer to glory. Rarely glimpsed in a lifetime.

Death Stench Bowels Alpha.description: This gear gives off a stench of decay, as though death's aroma permeates the air around you...

Demon Belt Alpha.description: The belt worn by a demon of combat who lives for brutal duels to the death. (Full Armor Set)

Diver's Belt Alpha.description: Diving Ticket waistgear. As versatile as it is stylish, no underwater adventure is complete without this utility belt.

Dober Coil Alpha.description: Waistgear made of unknown black bones, perhaps from an ancient dragon king.
